series_metadata.series_title: Purchase Orders, Supplier Contracts, and Related Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Documents authorizing the purchase of goods or services and documents or other encumbering materials supporting those authorizations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Pursuant R.C. 2305.06, six complete fiscal years contract expires ; Paper: Pursuant R.C. 2305.06, six complete fiscal years contract expires
